payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial dark brown wooden picture frame with a slightly worn, scuffed finish and thin gilded inner trim, visible along the left and bottom edges of the crop surrounding a muted seascape print of sailboats; frame shows beveled molding and is edge-cropped (estimated distance ~0.7 m).
